subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast believed in a Beauty that hath shone forth upon all regions!  Although, to outward seeming
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من آمن بجمال لاح علی الآفاق هر چند مدتیست که مکاتبه و مخابره
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
